nasb.text: You shall not defile the land in which you live, in the midst of which I dwell; for I the Lord am dwelling in the midst of the sons of Israel.’ ”

esv.text: You shall not defile the land in which you live, in the midst of which I dwell, for I the Lord dwell in the midst of the people of Israel.”

cnv.text: 你們不可玷污你所住的地，就是我居住的地，因為我耶和華是居住在以色列人中間的。’”

ccb.text: 不可玷污你们所居住的土地，因为这是我居住的地方，我耶和华住在以色列人中间。’”
